caption: A woman with dark hair tied in a top bun and curly strands framing her face sits in a podcast studio. She wears a dark green t-shirt with a circular red and white graphic on the front and large black headphones over her ears. She is positioned behind a black desk with a professional black microphone on a stand in front of her. In the background, a black banner features white text including "BOSS TALK 101," "CAST," and "About It!", along with a small logo and a image of hands. To the left, a framed picture of hands is mounted on a white wall. Small logos for "BOSS TALK 101" appear in the bottom corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a smiling expression, glancing slightly to her left and nodding, while her position and the surroundings remain static.
